prompts.SessionStart: steam boiler reaching operating pressure with triumphant whistle blast, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SessionEnd: steam engine exhaling last vapor as pistons slow to silence, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.Stop: steam pressure valve releasing with clean satisfying hiss, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PreToolUse: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk before action, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PostToolUse: bolt torqued to specification with final satisfying wrench click, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.PermissionPrompt: steam whistle blowing short questioning burst awaiting operator response, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.IdlePrompt: resting steam engine with slow periodic exhale of warm vapor, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStart: new gear teeth meshing into running clockwork mechanism with whir, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.SubagentStop: rotary dial completing return to rest position with settling tick, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: pneumatic tube canister launched with whooshing compressed air burst, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay
